# WAHA Interiors

> Premium interior design firm in Kasaragod, Kerala, India.

## About

WAHA Interiors is a luxury interior design studio based in Kasaragod, Kerala, India. We design serene, intentional spaces for residential, commercial, and landscape clients. Our philosophy is the "Oasis Concept" — every space should feel like a sanctuary.

## Services

- **Residential Interior Design**: Full-service design for homes, villas, and apartments in Kasaragod and Kerala.
- **Commercial Interior Design**: Offices, restaurants, retail, and hospitality spaces.
- **Landscape Design**: Outdoor living, garden courts, terraces, and water features.

## Primary Service Area

Kasaragod, Mogral, Manjeshwar, Kanhangad, and broader Kerala, India.

## Target Clients

- Homeowners building or renovating in Kasaragod
- Property developers in Kerala
- Commercial businesses in Kasaragod district
- Clients seeking premium, minimalist interior design

## Differentiators

- Deep understanding of Kerala's climate, materials, and culture
- Minimalist luxury aesthetic — clean, serene, architectural
- Bilingual service: English and Malayalam
- End-to-end project management

## Contact

- **Website**: https://wahainteriors.com
- **Email**: hello@wahainteriors.com
- **Location**: Kasaragod, Kerala, India - 671121
- **Languages**: English, Malayalam
